Emmanuel Odigwe
Creative Editor · Graphic Designer · UI/UX Designer
Professional Summary

Emmanuel Odigwe is a creative and highly skilled multimedia designer with 5+ years of hands-on experience across video editing, graphic design, motion design, UI/UX, and brand identity. Known professionally as The Pro Editor, he operates under one powerful promise — Your Vision, But Perfected.

Self-taught and continuously evolving, Emmanuel has built his expertise through dedicated learning, online courses, and real-world client work. He served as Chief Graphic Designer at Tallsportz for 2 years full-time, leading the creation of high-quality graphics, promotional materials, social media visuals, and motion graphics.

His work is defined by attention to detail, fast delivery, and brand consistency. Currently open to freelance, remote, and contract opportunities worldwide.

Work Experience
Chief Graphic Designer
Tallsportz
2 Years · Full-Time
  • Designed high-quality graphics, promotional materials and branding assets across all digital platforms
  • Created engaging social media visuals, marketing content and video edits for digital campaigns
  • Produced motion graphics, animated intro/outro clips strengthening brand identity
  • Maintained professional visual standards and collaborated with creative teams consistently

My Works

Brand Identity
BrandingLogo Design
The Pro Editor — Brand Identity
A brand born from a vision
This wasn't just a logo. It was the moment a freelancer became a brand. The wings represent creative freedom. The hand-script says THE PRO — raw, confident, unapologetic. EDITOR stands bold beneath it. Built entirely from scratch.
🏷️ Brand Design
▶
Social Media
Social MediaGraphic Design
Services Promo — Dark Anime Edit
When your aesthetic IS your pitch
Designed as a social media post to announce services. The hooded anime figure communicates mystery and mastery. Clean typography on dark. No noise. Just impact. Used across X and Telegram.
📲 Social Content
▶
Promo Flyer
Graphic DesignPromo
Service Promo Flyer — Full Layout
The flyer that got the DMs coming in
A full promotional flyer built from a blank canvas. Split-layout design — bold type on the left, lifestyle photo on the right. Tagline "Your Vision, But Perfected" anchors the bottom. Designed in Canva + Photoshop.
🖼️ Print & Digital
▶
Motion · Intro
Motion DesignLogo Intro
Neon Glow Logo Animation
Three seconds that make a creator look legendary
A custom animated logo intro with a neon light draw-on effect against a deep space background. Built for YouTube/Reels openers. The glow, particle dust, timing — everything intentional.
✨ Motion Graphics
▶
Creative Edit
Creative EditVFX
Anime × Real-World Composite
What if your world looked like an anime?
A seamless composite blending a real-world night scene with an anime character. Precise masking, colour-matched lighting, and atmospheric depth make the character feel like they were always there.
🎬 VFX Composite

Banner DesignDark Theme
Dark Warrior — Profile Banner
Your profile is your first impression. Make it hit.
A cinematic profile banner featuring a hooded warrior with glowing ember particles. Used by content creators to brand their X and YouTube channels.

Channel Banner — Alternate Cut
